metadata.description: Deploy Intune Analytics Platform - One-click deployment with Function App + ADX + Code
Base name for all resources (max 15 chars)
Deploy new free-tier ADX cluster? Set false if using existing cluster.
URI of existing ADX cluster (only if deployAdxCluster is false)
Name of existing ADX database (only if deployAdxCluster is false)
Automatically grant Microsoft Graph API permissions to the managed identity. Requires Application Administrator or Global Admin role.

resources.comments: Consumption plan for Function App (free tier)
resources.name: [variables('appServicePlanName')]

resources.comments: Grant Function App ingestor access to ADX database
resources.name: [concat(variables('adxClusterName'), '/', variables('adxDatabaseName'), '/FunctionAppIngestor')]

resources.comments: ADX Schema - Creates tables, materialized views, and functions
resources.name: [concat(variables('adxClusterName'), '/', variables('adxDatabaseName'), '/CreateSchema')]

resources.comments: Grant Microsoft Graph API permissions to the Function App managed identity
resources.name: [concat(variables('functionAppName'), '-grant-graph-permissions')]

resources.comments: User-assigned managed identity for the deployment script - grant this identity 'Application Administrator' in Entra ID for automatic permission assignment
resources.name: [concat(variables('functionAppName'), '-deployer')]

value.title: ⚠️ One-Time Setup Required (Before First Deployment)
value.description: The deployer identity needs the 'Application Administrator' role to grant Graph API permissions automatically.
setupSteps: 1. After deployment completes, go to Azure Portal → Entra ID → Roles and administrators
2. Find 'Application Administrator' role and click it
3. Add the deployer identity (shown in deployerIdentityPrincipalId output) as a member
4. Re-run the deployment - Graph permissions will now be assigned automatically
Run this PowerShell in Cloud Shell after first deployment:
value.alternativeCommand: [concat('# Grant Application Administrator to the deployer identity\n$deployerPrincipalId = "', if(parameters('grantGraphPermissions'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', concat(variables('functionAppName'), '-deployer')), '2023-01-31').principalId, 'N/A'), '"\nNew-AzRoleAssignment -ObjectId $deployerPrincipalId -RoleDefinitionName "Application Administrator" -Scope "/"')]

manualPermissionsCommand.value:
[concat('# Alternative: Run this manually in Azure Cloud Shell (PowerShell) if auto-grant fails
$miId = "', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId, '"
$graphId = (Get-AzADServicePrincipal -ApplicationId "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000").Id
New-AzADServicePrincipalAppRoleAssignment -ServicePrincipalId $miId -ResourceId $graphId -AppRoleId "dc377aa6-52d8-4e23-b271-2a7ae04cedf3" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
New-AzADServicePrincipalAppRoleAssignment -ServicePrincipalId $miId -ResourceId $graphId -AppRoleId "dc377aa6-52d8-4e23-b271-2a7ae6b159e6" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue')]
